evals.prompt: Run today's Robotaxi monitoring daily report, and write deduplicated new content to the Projects & Milestones table, don't update master tables.
evals.expected_output: Should execute daily monitoring Plan B: search, dedup, write to projects table, output pending confirmation summary, do not update master tables.

evals.prompt: I confirm syncing item 1 from today's report, but only sync partners, don't update operational status.
evals.expected_output: Should read item 1 from projects table, only update partner-related master tables/fields per user's confirmed scope, and write back sync status to projects table.

evals.prompt: Overseas news mentions Miami and Abu Dhabi, when archiving note that the region table city names are in Chinese.
evals.expected_output: Should preserve original city names, auto-translate Chinese names, attempt to match Region Dictionary using Chinese name and city English name, mark as pending human confirmation if unable to reliably match.
